case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE ARMANDO YAH UC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - UNABLE TO FORWARD.SENT TO DEFENDANT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT YAH UC, JOSE ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAH UC, JOSE ARMANDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-20-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YAH UC, JOSE ARMANDO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE ARMANDO YAH UC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
